svg.text: Outline studies — display cut as stroke only
At small sizes (48 / 32 px) — solid small cut for reference, then black outline, then cells outline:
48 px: solid | outline | cells-outline 32 px: solid | outline | cells-outline
Outline weight is in 100-unit leaf space: stroke 2.4 at 48 px renders ≈ 1.2 px; at 32 px ≈ 0.8 px.
